sentences.english: I need to ask for an extension on the project deadline.
The current deadline is next Friday right?
Yes but we've run into some unexpected technical issues.
sentences.korean: 네 하지만 예상치 못한 기술적 문제가 발생했습니다.

sentences.english: The API integration is taking longer than we estimated because of compatibility issues with the legacy system.
sentences.korean: 레거시 시스템과의 호환성 문제 때문에 API 연동이 예상보다 오래 걸리고 있습니다.

sentences.english: How much additional time do you need?
Five business days would be enough to deliver everything at the quality level we promised.
sentences.korean: 영업일 5일이면 약속한 품질 수준으로 모든 것을 전달하기 충분합니다.

sentences.english: I can approve three extra days but no more than that.
sentences.korean: 3일 추가는 승인할 수 있지만 그 이상은 안 됩니다.

quiz.question: What does '레거시 시스템' mean in English?
